title: Yoruba Proverbs: The Wisdom of the Elders
description: Yoruba proverbial wisdom covering justice, patience, community, and the relationship between the visible and invisible worlds.
introduction: Yoruba proverbial wisdom covering justice, patience, community, and the relationship between the visible and invisible worlds.

translation.text: However long the night, the dawn will come. The mouth that eats does not speak bitter words.
